name: Super Sweet & Sour Tempeh
recipeInstructions:
1. In a bowl, mix the water, salt (reduce if desired), coriander, and garlic.
2. Dip tempeh chunks into the mixture, then coat with cornstarch.
3. Deep fry in hot oil until golden brown. Drain on paper towels and set aside.
4. To make the sauce, heat oil in a skillet and sauté onion for 4 to 5 minutes.
5. Add water, honey, soy sauce, vinegar, tahini, ginger, and green onion to the skillet. Bring to a boil.
6. Dissolve cornstarch in 2 tbsp water, then stir into the sauce until smooth.
7. Stir until thickened. Place tempeh chunks into the sauce and cook briefly over low heat until heated through.
8. Serve over rice or pasta. This dish is great hot or cold.
